arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes Real Madrid comparison on Liverpool’s Champions League battle
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot cited the winning mantra of Real Madrid ahead of their key UEFA Champions League return next week. The Reds were forced to battle at the Parc des Princes as Luis Enrique’s PSG dominated the Premier League leaders in Paris.
